industries.name: Financial Services
industries.description: Banks, insurers, asset managers, and fintechs operating in one of the most targeted and heavily regulated sectors in cybersecurity.
challenges: High-value targets for financially motivated attackers
Complex regulatory requirements (PCI DSS, DORA, SOC 2, FCA expectations)
Legacy systems that cannot easily be patched or replaced
Third-party and supply chain risk from extensive ecosystem dependencies

industries.name: Healthcare
industries.description: Hospitals, clinics, medical device manufacturers, and health-tech companies protecting some of the most sensitive personal data in existence.
challenges: Patient data protection under HIPAA and equivalent regulations
Medical device security and OT/IoT risk
Clinical system availability requirements
Ransomware as a leading threat vector for the sector

industries.name: Government
industries.description: Public sector organizations managing critical infrastructure, citizen data, and national security requirements.
challenges: Nation-state threat actors with sophisticated capabilities
Complex procurement and accreditation requirements
Aging IT infrastructure with limited modernization budgets
Insider threat risk in sensitive environments

industries.name: Education
industries.description: Universities, schools, and ed-tech platforms balancing open academic environments with protection of student and research data.
challenges: Open network environments that conflict with security controls
Large attack surfaces from diverse student, staff, and research devices
Research data and intellectual property protection
Limited security budget relative to complexity

industries.name: Manufacturing
industries.description: Industrial manufacturers with operational technology environments that were never designed with cybersecurity in mind.
challenges: OT/IT convergence introducing cyber risk to production environments
Legacy industrial systems with no patch path
Supply chain compromise as an entry vector
Business continuity requirements limiting maintenance windows

industries.name: Retail
industries.description: Retailers and e-commerce businesses protecting payment card data, customer information, and high-availability transaction systems.
challenges: PCI DSS compliance and cardholder data environment scoping
E-commerce application security and fraud risk
Seasonal traffic spikes that complicate security operations
Third-party integrations and supply chain risk
